smg.text: Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. A few showers later. Possible thunderstorms later. Force 2 to 3 east to southeasterly winds, becoming force 4 southwesterly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. A few showers later. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds, occasionally force 5.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
